hypothesis: Highest-ceiling candidate. N=6 depth recurrence + 524K batch + LR=0.04 + frac warmdown + multi-skip. On 1xH100 only got 343 steps (1750ms/step) but reached 1.9428 with loss still steeply declining. On 8xH100: ~220ms/step, ~2700 steps, ~1.4B tokens. The deeper recurrence needs more steps to converge — this is where it gets them.
